title: Vine Boom Mace
description: Replaces the Mace Sounds with the infamous Vine Boom Sound. Simple & Lightweight
body:
**🤨 Vine Boom, you know what it is. The Mace is perfect to be combined with this sound**

🪶 Very Lightweight and is compatible with Mods/Resource Packs **(That doesn't change the Mace sounds)**

_This is my small Side Project, it'll be maintained for as long as possible._
